scores.correctness_notes: The response covers the core pattern correctly (declaring provides in charmcraft.yaml, fetching libs, using provider classes, writing to app databag). However, it omits the newer PyPI-based approach (charmlibs.interfaces.* namespace) entirely, focusing only on the legacy charmhub-hosted approach. The manual provider pattern is accurately described.
scores.hallucination_notes: none — data_platform_libs.data_interfaces, DatabaseProvides, DatabaseRequestedEvent, database_requested event, set_credentials, and set_endpoints all correspond to real APIs in the Canonical data platform library
